content:
## User

Stop duplicate invoice jobs while preserving the queue schema and at-most-once side effects.

## Assistant

The initial hypothesis is that the broker delivers the same message twice after a network retry.

## Assistant

src/worker/lease.ts now stores the marker before handler dispatch; the deterministic fake-clock test is still missing.

## User

Do not change queue payloads. Add the fake-clock regression before touching retry policy.
